name: create-agent-arch
description: End-to-end OpenClaw agent creation workflow covering 5 phases: architecture design, file scaffolding, configuration, testing, and deployment. Most ambitious ClawHub submission to date.
catalog_note: Documentation primarily in Chinese. npx playbooks dependency required. English translation in progress.
review: Most ambitious ClawHub submission — 5-phase agent creation workflow covering the full OpenClaw agent lifecycle. All referenced files present and structure is sound. Conditional approval: npx playbooks dependency is undocumented and documentation is currently Chinese-only. English translation in progress.

drax_results.notes: Requires npx playbooks. All referenced files present. Chinese-only docs noted.
